subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Ḥusayn! The beginning of all things is to recognize the Dawning-Place of the Command and the Manifestation of the Divine Self, and the end thereof is steadfastness in His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الحسین اول امر معرفت مشرق امر و مظهر نفس الهی است و آخر آن استقامت بر
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
